find reliable tools →

I'm a maker and art preparator based in Los Angeles. My day work is museum-grade fabrication and installation: risers, pedestals, grid systems, hanging, and the odd wall of acoustic foam carved to the millimeter. Off the clock I'm in my studio, building a cyberdeck or making custom furniture out of the humble material of plywood.

Maker or tinkerer — I've stopped trying to decide which comes first.

institutions where the handy duck has a lent hand:

  • Fulcrum Arts Pasadena, CA
  • Heaven Gallery Chicago, IL
  • Epiphany Center for the Arts Chicago, IL
  • Weinberg / Newton Gallery Chicago, IL
  • Museum of Contemporary Art Chicago, IL
  • Museum of Contemporary Art Los Angeles, CA
  • Lucas Museum of Narrative Art Los Angeles, CA

education:

  • B.A. English University of California
  • RE-TOOL 21: Art Handling & Fabrication School of the Art Institute of Chicago

certifications:

  • Chicago Industrial Arts & Design woodworking fellow 2022
  • Los Angeles Woodshop scholarship recipient 2023
